prompts.name: review_file_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to review the contents of a specific file.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: The text content of the file

prompts.name: commit_message_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to generate a conventional commit message for a git diff.

arguments.name: diff
arguments.description: The git diff output to analyze

prompts.name: create_file_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to generate code for a new file with specified requirements.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.description: Relative path to the file to create

arguments.name: requirements
arguments.description: Functional requirements for the new file's content

prompts.name: write_and_commit_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt instructing the agent to write a file and then commit and push it.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.description: Relative path to the file to write

arguments.name: content
arguments.description: The content to write to the file

arguments.name: commit_message
arguments.description: The git commit message to use

prompts.name: update_and_commit_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt instructing the agent to update a file and then commit and push it.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.description: Relative path to the file to update

arguments.name: target_text
arguments.description: The exact target text to replace

arguments.name: replacement_text
arguments.description: The replacement text to put in

arguments.name: commit_message
arguments.description: The git commit message to use

prompts.name: advanced_diff_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt instructing the agent to run and analyze an advanced diff between branches.

prompts.name: branch_history_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to analyze the visual branch history graph of the repository.

prompts.name: file_history_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to perform code archaeology on a specific file's commit history.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.description: Relative path to the file to analyze

prompts.name: file_blame_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to run blame on a file to analyze authorship and trace refactor histories.

arguments.name: file_path
arguments.description: Relative path to the file to analyze

prompts.name: inspect_commit_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to inspect details of a specific commit SHA.

prompts.name: check_merge_safety_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to simulate merge safety checks and conflict resolutions.

prompts.name: analyze_churn_risk_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to analyze code churn risk, ownership entropy, and logical couplings.

prompts.name: detect_code_similarity_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to look for copy-pasted blocks and rename actions across branches.

prompts.name: get_semantic_diff_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to check semantic diffs: API signature updates and complexity metrics.

prompts.name: query_object_graph_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to query the lower-level Git object graph or reflogs.

arguments.name: param1
arguments.description: First parameter (e.g. commit hash, ref name, or blob SHA)

prompts.name: get_diff_with_algorithm_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt instructing the agent to run a diff with specific algorithms (histogram, patience, etc.).

arguments.name: algorithm
arguments.description: The diff algorithm to use (myers, patience, histogram, minimal)

prompts.name: search_repository_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt to search the repository for patterns or variables.

prompts.name: run_pr_audit_prompt
prompts.description: Prompt instructing the agent to execute the full automated PR audit report.
